title: AVP / Head, Government Digital Solutions
description:
We are seeking a highly experienced and strategic leader to head the Government Digital Solutions Business Unit, responsible for delivering enterprise-grade digital platforms and applications for Whole-of-Government (WOG) customers.

This is a senior leadership role combining P&L ownership, product strategy, enterprise delivery, and stakeholder management, working closely with cross-functional teams and major enterprise software partners to support Singapore’s digital government agenda.

Key Responsibilities

  • Lead the Government Digital Solutions BU with full P&L responsibility, overseeing product strategy, innovation, and delivery.
  • Drive the development and delivery of enterprise digital solutions such as workflows, portals, case management systems, and data platforms.
  • Ensure solutions align with national digital frameworks (e.g. GCC, Zero Trust, IM8) and meet security and compliance standards.
  • Build and manage strategic partnerships with enterprise software OEMs, overseeing platform integration and vendor performance.
  • Ensure programmes are delivered on time, within budget, and to quality standards, including managing escalations.
  • Lead, mentor, and grow high-performing cross-functional teams across product, architecture, engineering, and delivery.
  • Act as a trusted advisor and executive sponsor for senior government stakeholders and key customers.

Requirements

  • 10+ years of senior leadership experience in enterprise software delivery, public-sector programmes, or large-scale digital transformation.
  • Strong track record delivering complex, multi-agency enterprise systems.
  • Proven experience managing OEM partnerships, enterprise platforms, and vendor engagements.
  • Solid exposure to P&L ownership, contract management, and large programme delivery.
  • Good understanding of government digital frameworks, cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP), and security/compliance standards.
  • Experience with Agile / DevSecOps delivery models; certifications are an advantage.
  • Exposure to AI-enabled or cloud-based digital solutions is a plus.
  • Strong stakeholder management skills, especially with senior government or enterprise leaders.
  • Proven people leadership capability and high integrity.

To Apply or find out more information on this role, please email us or send your updated resume to: lynn.tay@starcareerconsulting.com

Lynn Tay (Reg. No. R1876711)
